title: Privacy Policy
author: Priya
content:
Privacy Policy

Last updated: 04/10/2026

At Interview Prep for Insiders, we value the privacy of our visitors.

We do not collect personal information unless voluntarily provided by users through comments or communication. Any information shared by users will only be used to respond to queries or improve the website experience.

Like many websites, we may use log files that include information such as IP address, browser type, date and time of visit, and pages visited. This information is used for analysis and improving the website.

We may use cookies to enhance user experience by remembering visitor preferences.

This website may display ads from **Google AdSense, which may use cookies to show relevant advertisements based on user interests.

We are not responsible for the privacy policies of third-party websites linked on this site.

By using this website, you agree to this Privacy Policy.
